title: Slippery Bridge
description: While crossing a rickety wooden bridge, there is a sudden [blue][jitter]torrent of rain[/jitter][/blue]. [purple][sine]Massive gusts of wind[/sine][/purple] buffet you, threatening to end your journey.

options.title: Hold On
options.description: Lose [red]3[/red] HP. The card in the above option is randomized.

conditions: All players must have at least one removable card
notes:
Each time you choose [gold]Hold On[/gold], you take [red]unblockable[/red] damage and the event advances to a new page. The HP cost starts at [red]3[/red] and increases by 1 with each hold ([red]3[/red], [red]4[/red], [red]5[/red], ...). After each hold, a new card is selected for the [gold]Overcome[/gold] option.

The [gold]Overcome[/gold] card is chosen from removable cards in your deck, preferring non-Basic cards on the first selection. On subsequent holds, it tries to pick a different card type than the one shown previously. If no alternative exists, it falls back to any removable card.

The event has 7 unique pages of escalating distress text (HOLD_ON_0 through HOLD_ON_6). After 7 or more holds, the page loops indefinitely with the developer's apology for running out of text.
